prompt: First-person point of view (POV) holding a modern smartphone over a wooden cafe table. On the screen, a clear photo of a paper restaurant receipt is being scanned by a glowing teal and lime green interface. Holographic nutrition data, charts, and calorie numbers (Kcal) float subtly above the phone in a clean, futuristic UI style. In the background, a blurred premium lifestyle cafe setting with warm lighting and a plate of fresh healthy food. Photorealistic, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, teal and blue neon accents, high-end tech aesthetic, vertical composition.
negative_prompt: text, logos, watermarks, qr codes, distorted hands, extra fingers, messy handwriting on receipt, low quality, cartoon, anime, dark gloomy colors, red neon, cluttered background
notes: Used POV holding a phone to directly illustrate the 'Sphotographed. Sent. Received.' workflow mentioned in the text.
Incorporated the teal/green and blue glow from the brand references to maintain visual consistency.
Focused on the 'receipt' element from the post text as the primary trigger for the UI overlay.
Ensured the UI is 'subtle cyberpunk' (holographic/clean) rather than 'gritty cyberpunk' to keep the premium food brand feel.
Specified vertical composition for social media compatibility.
